1950","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可好看了，一开始是在ks上刷到的，后来听说可以在番茄看就过来了，真的很好看！追了两个月，就是总觉得肖军的时间静止还可以更强大的！总体来说很好看，作者加油！就是不知道为什么，即使是比较圆满的结局读完后还是有点不舍得啊啊啊，这是我追的第一部小说，作者真的很棒！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668873642,"group_id":"7051529986372537376","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"谁生来都将狂野，心快跑向春天吧❗️","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6jH4fckeIuJAC1D5u/URBjXNlBlV25hELYgLreKiket","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3c605519985b447da2716f722cc8ab70~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706853&x-signature=VGFEkl1nuEaEMxTY62Yz4TzNT7Y%3D","user_id":"3298132528993886","user_name":"盛夏初相识"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3298132528993886","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7051529986372537376","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+重生+异能】
